exercises.title: Gate Teleportation Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate T gate teleportation using magic states.
tasks: Verify output is T|ψ⟩ for various input states
hints: |T⟩ can be prepared as T applied to |+⟩
CNOT: data controls, magic is target
Measure in X basis = H then Z measurement
Use state fidelity to verify correctness

exercises.title: Distillation Error Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze error suppression in magic state distillation.
tasks: Calculate p_out for various p_in values
Determine levels needed for target error rate
Plot error rate vs distillation level
hints: Raw states: 15^k per output at level k

exercises.title: Distillation Protocol Simulator
tasks: Track output fidelity over many trials
hints: Measure success rate and output fidelity

exercises.title: Magic State Factory Scheduler
exercises.description: Design a magic state factory with optimal throughput.
tasks: Given T gate consumption rate, size factory
Analyze factory qubit and time costs
hints: Need buffer to handle consumption bursts
Multiple distillation units run in parallel
Account for ~15% failure rate at 1% input error
